examples: Quite unprompted, Sam started telling us exactly what had happened that night.
But such gloomy views are seldom offered unprompted.
Such musings are not, of course, unprompted. This year, Amsterdam is celebrating the 400th anniversary of Rembrandt's birth, and it is hard to escape his shadow.
But in a huddle with reporters in Independence, he turned, unprompted, to Mr. Romney.
So McBryde's unprompted broadside at his Wales players is a little surprising.
